progress.title: Progress
guide.title: How to use Tusab?
guide.subtitle: Step-by-step guide
guide.step1: Paste a YouTube channel URL in the sidebar and click Confirm Channel.
guide.step2: Click Start Extraction, select content types and confirm. To extract multiple channels in sequence, add them to the Extraction Queue — the engine moves to the next one automatically.
guide.step3: In the Repository tab, add PDFs, Word, Excel spreadsheets, CSV, Markdown, pasted text, WhatsApp conversations, meeting transcripts, images (PNG, JPG) and audio (MP3, WAV). Content is converted to text and enters the same search index.
guide.step4: Enable Google Drive to automatically sync your extracted knowledge base to the cloud. Without authentication, everything stays in the local data/neural/ folder.
guide.step5: In Configure Agent, choose your AI provider: Ollama runs 100% locally with no API key and no cost. Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic and Groq require an API key — use Test Key before saving.
guide.step6: Click Index Now to build the search index. Re-index whenever you add new content.
log.title: Real-Time Log
log.ready: Welcome to Tusab! Waiting for the extraction engine to start.
log.complete_steps: Complete the steps on the side to begin.
agent.embed_key_note: Claude has no embeddings API. Provide a Gemini key for vectorization.
agent.get_key_gemini: Get Gemini key at Google AI Studio
agent.index_note_new: Index the extracted files to enable chat with the agent.
agent.index_note_update: Reindex to update the base with newly extracted videos.
agent.chat_empty_no_index: Index the knowledge base above to start chatting with the agent.
agent.chat_empty_ready_multi: Ask questions crossing the content of {{count}} selected bases.
ops.types_modal_title: What would you like to extract?
ops.types_modal_subtitle: Select the content types from the channel.
onboarding.s1_body: Point to what you want to learn — a YouTube channel, a PDF, a spreadsheet, a WhatsApp conversation, an audio file, an image. Tusab absorbs everything, indexes it locally, and answers your questions citing the exact source. No data ever leaves your machine.
onboarding.s2_body: Paste any channel URL, choose content types (videos, shorts, lives, podcasts…) and start. Want to extract several channels at once? Add them to the queue — the engine finishes one and automatically starts the next.
onboarding.s3_body: Beyond YouTube, add PDFs, Word, Excel spreadsheets, CSV, Markdown, pasted text, WhatsApp conversations, meeting transcripts (Otter, Zoom, Teams), images (PNG, JPG, WEBP) and audio (MP3, WAV, M4A). Images are described by AI; audio is transcribed locally. Everything becomes searchable text in the same base.
onboarding.s4_body: Enable Google Drive to automatically sync your extracted base to the cloud. Without authentication, everything stays locally in the data/neural/ folder — the product works 100% offline without Drive.
onboarding.s5_body: Chat requires an AI model. Use Ollama to run everything locally — no cost, no data leaving your machine. You can also configure Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic or Groq in the Agent tab later.
onboarding.s6_body: With content in the repository, go to Configure Agent and click Index Now. The search index is built locally in seconds. Then open the chat, select your base and start asking — every answer comes with the exact source citation.
onboarding.s7_body: The Report tab shows how many videos were extracted, which had captions, total coverage and full history per channel. Tabs are independent — explore at your own pace.
onboarding.choose_profile: First, tell us who you are
onboarding.s1_body_estudante: Receive ready-made knowledge bases from your teacher and use the chat to ask questions about the content. Everything stays on your machine, with exact source citations.
onboarding.s1_body_professor: Create knowledge bases from YouTube channels and your own materials. Then export and share them with your students in one click.
onboarding.s6_body_estudante: Import the .tusab file received from your teacher. Tusab loads the base ready to go — you can start asking questions without any setup.
onboarding.s6_body_professor: After extracting and indexing, export the base as .tusab and send it to your students. They open the file and can already chat with the content.
onboarding.s_notif_body: Tusab can notify you when an extraction finishes or when the chat replies while you're in another tab. Enable notifications so you never miss a result.
onboarding.notif_granted: Notifications enabled — you'll be notified when extractions and chat responses finish.
onboarding.notif_denied: Notifications blocked by the browser. To enable them, click the lock icon in the address bar and allow notifications for this app.
notify.chat_done_body_canal: Response about @{{canal}} is ready in Tusab.
modal.subtitle: What would you like to do with the extracted data?
modal.drive_desc_connected: Files synced to Drive. Open NotebookLM and import the folder to use them as context.
modal.drive_desc_local: Files were saved locally in data/neural/youtube/. Authenticate Google Drive to sync them.
modal.agent_desc: Set your API key, index the knowledge base, and ask questions directly about channel content.
modal.agent_configured: Agent configured and ready to use
modal.agent_not_configured: Configure your API key in the AI Agent tab
agent.index_what: Indexing reads the extracted .txt files, splits the content into chunks, and generates vector embeddings stored locally. This enables the agent to perform semantic search over channel content.
agent.index_prereq_key: Configure an API key above to enable indexing.
agent.index_prereq_channel: Configure a channel in the sidebar to enable indexing.
agent.index_prereq_content: Add files to the Repository or configure a channel in the Extraction tab to enable indexing.
guide.step7: Open the chat using the button in the bottom right. Restricted mode searches only your local base; Broad Search lets the model supplement with its training knowledge.
guide.step8: In chat, select multiple bases to cross-reference knowledge from different channels and sources in a single question.
guide.step9: In the Report tab, track extracted videos, caption coverage and channel history.
guide.step10: Every answer cites the exact source. No citation means the content hasn't been indexed yet.

chat.restricted_desc: Uses only your knowledge base. Answers anchored to your documents.
chat.broad_desc: Combines your base with the model's general knowledge. More context, less precision.
chat.search_info_aria: Learn more about Broad and Restricted Search
chat.ollama_required_body: Tusab uses Ollama to run AI models locally, without sending your data to the internet. Install Ollama to get started — or configure an external provider (Gemini, OpenAI, Groq) in the Agent tab.
chat.ollama_or_provider: Or configure an external provider in the Agent tab
chat.ollama_no_model_body: Ollama is running, but you haven't downloaded any model yet. Go to the Agent tab and download a model to start chatting.
chat.ollama_no_model_banner: Ollama is active, but no model is installed. Go to Configure Agent → download a model to get started.
chat.ollama_no_model_placeholder: Download a model in the Agent tab to start chatting…
chat.persona_modal_desc: Choose how the assistant should communicate
chat.restricted_body: Answers exclusively with content from your base — YouTube transcripts, documents, added texts. If the answer isn't there, the assistant reports it found nothing.
chat.restricted_hint: Ideal for: retrieving precise information from specific content. No risk of invented data.
chat.broad_body: Uses your base as the primary reference and supplements with the model's general knowledge when needed — useful for context, additional explanations or open-ended questions.
chat.broad_hint: Slower than Restricted Search — about 4 extra seconds per response. When using an external provider (Groq, OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic), messages are sent to third-party servers.
chat.base_modal_desc: Select the bases for this conversation
chat.no_history_hint: Click "New conversation" to save the current one.

periodicidade.desc: Set automatic alerts per channel — daily, weekly or monthly. Tusab checks for new videos and notifies you when your base needs reindexing.
citation.snackbar: Not a summary. It's a citation. — Every answer comes with the exact source where the excerpt was retrieved from.

persona.objetivo_desc: Short answers, no fluff. Focus on the essentials.
persona.didatico_desc: Explains step by step, like a teacher.
persona.descontraido_desc: Informal and accessible tone, without losing substance.
persona.socratico_desc: Responds with questions to stimulate reflection.

ia_modal.subtitle: Choose how Tusab will generate chat responses.
ia_modal.ollama_desc: Runs models like llama, gemma and phi directly on your computer — no internet, no cost, full privacy.
ia_modal.external_desc: Use Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic or Groq with your own key. Requires internet connection.

monitor.note: Metrics refer exclusively to the Tusab process
monitor.unavailable_desc: The monitoring module could not read process data. This usually occurs in corporate networks where security policies (EDR, GPO) restrict access to system metrics.
perfil.estudante_desc: I receive ready-made knowledge bases from teachers and use the chat to study.
perfil.professor_desc: I create and share knowledge bases with my students.
perfil.pesquisador_desc: I build corpora from multiple sources for in-depth analysis.
perfil.profissional_desc: I use Tusab for business intelligence and knowledge management.
perfil.especialista_desc: I use Tusab for advanced business intelligence and knowledge management.
perfil.alerta_estudante: By changing your profile you will have access to content editing and deletion features. If you received knowledge bases from a teacher, changes may be irreversible.
perfil.escolha_subtitulo: You can change this later at any time.
privacy.principle: Tusab is designed to process your data locally. Internet connections only occur in the situations below — your documents or transcripts are never sent to third parties without your explicit consent.
privacy.conn_youtube_desc: Fetches transcripts and metadata from configured channels. No video or audio is downloaded — only caption text.
privacy.conn_llm_desc: When using Groq, OpenAI, Gemini or Anthropic, your question and excerpts from the knowledge base are sent to the provider's server. Ollama runs 100% locally, with no data transmission.
privacy.conn_update_desc: Checks for a new version of Tusab and downloads the installer. None of your data is sent — only an anonymous version request.
privacy.conn_drive_desc: If you authenticate Drive, your transcripts are synced to your Google account. Without authentication, everything stays local.
privacy.updater_desc_on: The app automatically checks and downloads new versions on startup. Active.
privacy.updater_desc_off: Automatic version checking is disabled. Updates must be installed manually.
privacy.updater_aria: Enable or disable automatic app updates
privacy.updater_warning: With automatic updates disabled, you will not receive security fixes automatically. Check for new versions periodically.
privacy.footer_note: Tusab never collects usage data, telemetry or personal identification without consent.
corp.intro: In corporate networks, firewalls, proxies and security policies may block essential parts of Tusab. If the app hangs on the loading screen, the chat doesn't respond, or extraction fails, go through the diagnostic below and share it with your IT team.
corp.check_port_8001_desc: Tusab's Python backend listens on localhost:8001. Some corporate firewalls block non-standard local ports. If the app hangs on the loading screen, this is the most likely cause.
corp.check_port_11434_desc: Ollama uses this port to serve models locally. Required for offline chat. Without it, Tusab cannot communicate with Ollama even if it's installed.
corp.check_youtube_desc: Transcript extraction requires access to youtube.com and googlevideo.com. Corporate proxies with content filtering frequently block these URLs.
corp.check_github_desc: Tusab's auto-update downloads updates from github.com/ahaugusto/tusab-public. If blocked, the app continues to work normally — it just won't receive automatic updates.
corp.check_antivirus_title: Antivirus or EDR blocking the executable
corp.check_antivirus_desc: Solutions like CrowdStrike, Microsoft Defender for Endpoint or Symantec may block the embedded Python or yt-dlp as executables not signed by the corporate CA. Symptom: app opens but the backend never starts.
corp.check_gpo_desc: AppLocker or Software Restriction Policies may prevent the installer or internal binaries from running. Requires release by the domain administrator.
corp.it_item1: Allow TCP traffic on localhost ports 8001 and 11434 for the Tusab.exe process.
corp.it_item2: Add an antivirus/EDR exception for the %AppData%\Tusab folder and its subprocesses (python.exe, yt-dlp.exe).
corp.it_item3: Allow execution of the installer signed by publisher CriAugu (CNPJ 65.131.075/0001-57) and allow access to github.com for updates.
corp.disclaimer: Tusab is a local-first tool: your data never leaves the machine. The above exceptions refer only to internal communication ports (localhost) and internet access for content extraction and updates. Your IT team can evaluate each item individually.
proHint.title: You're going far!
proHint.subtitle: Tusab Pro is coming
proHint.body: You already have 3 or more indexed bases. Soon, Tusab Pro will allow unlimited bases, advanced search with semantic reranking, and much more.
update_success.title: Tusab updated!
update_success.subtitle: You're running the latest version.
aprofundar.title: Deepen base
aprofundar.subtitle: Enable richer, more complete answers
aprofundar.body: Tusab found {{count}} video(s) not yet deeply analyzed. With your model configured, it can generate a summary for each video so the chat answers with more context and accuracy.
aprofundar.note: The process runs in the background and won't interrupt indexing. You can close this window and keep using Tusab normally.
aprofundar.done_body: All videos have been analyzed. Future chat responses will have more context and depth.
